title: schiedea helleri
intro: Schiedea helleri, also known as Heller's schiedea, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Hawaii. It is a flowering plant with yellow flowers and is used in traditional Hawaiian medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, and is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Schiedea helleri can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
